Studio50 Premiere

Our first show airs Saturday, July 25 at 7 PM.

Join IN THE FIFTY for a focused, 50-minute live showcase built to spotlight standout makers, thoughtful products, and the businesses behind them.

Saturday, July 25 7:00 PM 50-minute live feature
Explore Studio50 Send Us a Lead

American Made First

Introducing Studio50

Many of us want to buy American-made — it really is that simple. What has not been simple is finding a wide variety of US-made products at competitive prices, while also giving businesses an affordable way to promote those products and services.

That is what the IN THE FIFTY initiative is all about. Studio50 is our live shopping experience built to showcase businesses and products made across all fifty states through an energetic, social-first broadcast format.

Live PremiereWebsiteEmailCommunity
Mark Your Calendar

First show: Saturday, July 25 at 7 PM

Join us online for approximately 50 minutes of live product discovery as we move through each episode's featured lineup.

Contact the Team

How Can You Help?

Help grow a people-first American-made movement

We are building a 1st of the people, by the people, for the people initiative — and your support helps more makers get discovered.

01

Share the launch with friends, family, and anyone who values thoughtful American-made businesses.

02

Share the initiative with friends and family who care about buying American-made.

03

Organize a watch party or group phone call during a live broadcast for more fun and reach.

04

Research American-made products and send us business names plus contact information.

Be Part of the Launch

Support the premiere in a way that feels personal and meaningful

Whether you tune in, share the date, or send a strong recommendation, every action helps strengthen the first Studio50 broadcast.

Join the first show Set aside 50 minutes for the July 25 premiere and experience the format from the very beginning.
Share the launch Pass the premiere details along to friends, family, and customers who appreciate quality and craftsmanship.
Send a recommendation Introduce us to businesses, products, or services that deserve a spotlight in an upcoming episode.

Get In Touch

Send product leads, business referrals, or partnership ideas

If you know a product, business, or service that belongs in Studio50, send the details directly to our team. Form submissions are addressed to info@inthefifty.com.

info@inthefifty.com

Submitting opens your default email app with the message addressed to info@inthefifty.com.
